orgWallet.title: Organization wallet
orgWallet.description: One shared wallet for your organization, secured by member passkeys
orgWallet.loadError: Could not load the organization wallet.
orgWallet.passkeyUnsupported: This device does not support passkeys. Try a device with Face ID, fingerprint, or a security key.
orgWallet.createError: Could not create the wallet. Please try again.
orgWallet.addSignerError: Could not add your passkey. Please try again.
orgWallet.removeSignerError: Could not remove this signer. Please try again.
orgWallet.deleteError: Could not remove the wallet. Please try again.
orgWallet.emptyHint: Create the organization's donation wallet with your passkey (Face ID, fingerprint, or security key). No seed phrase, nothing to install.
orgWallet.onlyOwnerCanCreate: Only the organization owner or an admin can create the wallet.
orgWallet.readyHint: This address can receive donations right away. It belongs to your organization and only the passkeys below can ever spend from it.
orgWallet.activeHint: This wallet is active on the blockchain. Its signers are now managed on-chain.
orgWallet.signersHint: Members of the organization can add their own passkey so they can approve payments too.
orgWallet.deleteConfirmBody: This can't be undone. If the organization creates a new wallet later, it will have a different address.
orgWallet.deleteConfirmFunds: This wallet already holds funds, so it can't be removed.
orgWallet.intro: The shared donation wallet for this organization, secured by member passkeys. Donations to its projects arrive at this address.
orgWallet.balancesEmpty: No funds yet. Donations sent to this address will show up here.
orgWallet.balancesError: Balances are unavailable right now. Refresh to try again.
orgWallet.sendIntro: Move money from the organization's wallet to any other wallet address. You approve every transfer with your passkey.
orgWallet.sendRecipientInvalid: Enter a valid wallet address — it starts with 0x followed by 40 characters.
orgWallet.sendAmountTooHigh: That is more than this wallet holds.
orgWallet.sendSubmitting: Sending — this can take a minute…
orgWallet.sendNoSigner: Only someone with a passkey enrolled on this wallet can send from it.
orgWallet.sendErrorNotConfigured: Sending is not enabled on this server yet.
orgWallet.sendErrorInsufficient: This wallet does not hold enough for that transfer.
orgWallet.sendErrorBusy: The network is busy right now. Please try again in a few minutes.
orgWallet.sendErrorSignature: The passkey approval could not be verified. Please try again.
orgWallet.sendErrorGeneric: The transfer could not be completed. Please try again.
orgWallet.thresholdOption: {count} of {total, plural, one {# passkey} other {# passkeys}}
orgWallet.thresholdHint: How many passkeys must approve each transfer. Requiring more than one is safer — a single lost or stolen passkey can't move funds on its own. Changing this gives the wallet a new address, so it's only possible before the wallet holds funds.
orgWallet.thresholdUpdateError: Could not change the approval requirement. Please try again.
orgWallet.thresholdLockedFunds: The wallet already holds funds, so the approval requirement can no longer be changed.
orgWallet.thresholdSingleWarning: Right now a single passkey can move funds. Consider requiring more approvals.
orgWallet.sendApprovalsNeeded: This wallet needs {count} approvals with different passkeys. You give the first one; the rest can be given here or from another device.
orgWallet.sendApprovalOf: Approval {current} of {total} — waiting for a passkey…
orgWallet.sendDuplicatePasskey: Each approval needs a different passkey.
orgWallet.pendingRemoteHint: Other passkey holders can approve from their own device — the transfer stays here until it has enough approvals. The last approval sends it.
orgWallet.pendingInvalid: This waiting transfer is no longer valid — the wallet changed since it was started. Cancel it to start a new one.
orgWallet.pendingCancelForbidden: Only the person who started this transfer or a wallet manager can cancel it.
orgWallet.sendErrorExpired: This transfer is no longer valid — the wallet or network fees changed. Please start it again.
orgWallet.sendErrorPendingExists: There is already a transfer waiting for approvals. Finish or cancel it first.
orgWallet.sendErrorApprovalInvalid: This approval could not be verified. Please try again.
orgWallet.onchainManageHint: This wallet is active on the blockchain, so passkey changes are recorded on-chain and need the usual approvals. GainForest covers the network fee.
orgWallet.thresholdOnchainHint: How many passkeys must approve each transfer. Changing this is recorded on the blockchain — the wallet address stays the same.
orgWallet.manageForbidden: Only the organization owner or an admin can make this change.
